torgovaya-dominatsiya.name: Trade dominance
torgovaya-dominatsiya.description: Control key markets and financial flows of the region.

voennoe-prevoskhodstvo.name: Military supremacy
voennoe-prevoskhodstvo.description: Field armies that can overwhelm any rival on land and sea.

podderzhanie-mira.name: Keeping the peace
podderzhanie-mira.description: Constrain escalation and preserve the balance among neighbours.

territorialnaya-ekspansiya.name: Territorial expansion
territorialnaya-ekspansiya.description: Steadily push borders outward and consolidate new lands.

religioznaya-ekspansiya.name: Religious expansion
religioznaya-ekspansiya.description: Spread your faith across neighbouring realms through missions and influence.

tekhnologicheskiy-progress.name: Technological progress
tekhnologicheskiy-progress.description: Invest in breakthroughs that bolster economy and armies.

kulturnaya-assimilyatsiya.name: Cultural assimilation
kulturnaya-assimilyatsiya.description: Weave neighbouring peoples in through language, schooling, symbols of authority.

zashchita-traditsiy.name: Defending traditions
zashchita-traditsiy.description: Preserve ancestral customs against sweeping change.

magicheskoe-prevoskhodstvo.name: Magical supremacy
magicheskoe-prevoskhodstvo.description: Amass foremost mages and artefacts to dominate the arcane sphere.

obedinenie-naroda.name: Uniting the people
obedinenie-naroda.description: Surmount fractures and forge a cohesive national endeavour.

sverzhenie-soseda.name: Toppling the neighbour
sverzhenie-soseda.description: Strip a neighbouring power of legitimacy—war, plots, sabotage of its economy.

nakoplenie-bogatstva.name: Wealth hoarding
nakoplenie-bogatstva.description: Concentrate resources and capital toward long‑term autonomy.

nauchnyy-progress.name: Scientific progress
nauchnyy-progress.description: Grow academies and labs for relentless discovery.

demokratizatsiya.name: Democratisation
demokratizatsiya.description: Shift power toward representative bodies and widen citizen participation.

restavratsiya-starogo-poryadka.name: Restoring the old order
restavratsiya-starogo-poryadka.description: Bring back prior institutions—undo recent reforms.

sozdanie-koloniy.name: Founding colonies
sozdanie-koloniy.description: Settle remote lands and lodge economic footholds.

kontrol-morskikh-putey.name: Command of sea lanes
kontrol-morskikh-putey.description: Dominate straits and ports—shipping and logistics obey you.

kontrol-torgovykh-marshrutov.name: Command of trade routes
kontrol-torgovykh-marshrutov.description: Monopolise caravan and river routes—set terms for exchange.

religioznoe-obrashchenie-sosedey.name: Converting neighbours
religioznoe-obrashchenie-sosedey.description: Peacefully or by pressure bring neighbours into your confession.

vyzhivanie.name: Survival
vyzhivanie.description: Keep the faction afloat amid crisis, shortage, outer pressure.

mest.name: Vengeance
mest.description: Punish those behind past defeats and vindicate tarnished honour.

osvobozhdenie-poraboshchennykh.name: Liberating the enslaved
osvobozhdenie-poraboshchennykh.description: Abolish bondage institutions and release dependent peoples.

poraboshchenie-sosedey.name: Subjugating neighbours
poraboshchenie-sosedey.description: Dominate adjacent peoples—exploit their resources for yours.

razvitie-iskusstv.name: Advancing the arts
razvitie-iskusstv.description: Use culture as a lever of prestige and cohesion.

diplomaticheskaya-gegemoniya.name: Diplomatic hegemony
diplomaticheskaya-gegemoniya.description: Be the decisive broker in alliances and treaties.

ekologicheskaya-garmoniya.name: Ecological harmony
ekologicheskaya-garmoniya.description: Balance growth with stewardship of nature.

industrializatsiya.name: Industrialisation
industrializatsiya.description: Shift toward mass production and sprawling infrastructure.
